title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
summary_full: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.
summary_public: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.
